item.title: Braves Sign New Closer in Blockbuster Deal
item.description: The Atlanta Braves announced a major bullpen acquisition today, signing a top closer to a multi-year deal.

item.title: Spring Training Update: Rotation Takes Shape
item.description: With opening day approaching, the Braves rotation is starting to come together after a strong spring.

item.title: Injury Report: Key Outfielder Day-to-Day
item.description: A key outfielder left yesterday's game early with a hamstring issue and is listed as day-to-day.
